item.title: 中国最大省级经济体誓言以人工智能重塑产业格局
item.description: 中国南部制造业和科技中心广东的官员及企业高管周五承诺，将在该省2万亿美元的经济体中全面推广人工智能应用。此前一天，北京刚刚推出"人工智能+"战略，旨在将这项技术融入经济发展的各个领域。【原文：Officials and executives in Guangdong, China's southern manufacturing and tech hub, on Friday vowed to expand artificial intelligence across its $2 trillion economy, a day ​after Beijing launched an AI plus strategy to embed the technology throughout the ‌economy.】

item.title: 美国机构将与Waymo、Zoox、Aurora首席执行官共同举办自动驾驶安全论坛
item.description: 美国国家公路交通安全管理局将于周二举办全国自动驾驶汽车安全论坛，届时将邀请自动驾驶公司Waymo、Zoox和Aurora的首席执行官出席。【原文：The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration ​will hold a national ‌autonomous vehicle safety forum that will include the CEOs ​of self-driving companies ​Waymo, Zoox and Aurora on ⁠Tuesday.】

item.title: 投资者紧抓避险交易，伊朗战争令经济前景完全不明朗
item.description: Some of the most crowded trades of the past year are emerging as the key shock absorbers for any potential market pain as war in the Middle East moves into a second week, bringing visibility over inflation and monetary policy to ​zero.

item.title: 罗宾汉面向散户投资者的6.58亿美元私募市场基金公开发售
item.description: 罗宾汉公司周五在纽约证券交易所推出其旗舰风险投资基金，规模达6.584亿美元，为散户投资者提供了难得的机会，使其能够投资于备受瞩目的私营科技公司。【原文：Robinhood debuted its flagship $658.4 million venture fund on the New York Stock Exchange on Friday, offering retail investors a rare chance to ​invest in high-profile, privately held technology companies.】

item.title: 康科德金融集团遭美国证交会罚款2000万美元
item.description: 美国证券交易委员会周五宣布，因未能提交约150份可疑交易报告，对康科迪亚金融集团处以2000万美元罚款。【原文：The U.S. Securities ​and Exchange ‌Commission said on ​Friday ​it fined Canaccord Genuity $20 ⁠million ​for failing ​to file approximately 150 suspicious ​activity ​reports.】

item.title: 巴西银行在阿根廷推出Pix支付功能，瞄准市场扩张
item.description: 巴西国有银行Banco do Brasil周五推出一项新功能，允许在阿根廷的巴西人通过Pix即时支付系统进行付款。【原文：Brazil's state-run Banco do Brasil on Friday launched a feature allowing Brazilians in Argentina to make ​payments through the Pix instant-payments system.】

item.title: 贝莱德限制私募信贷基金赎回额度，因赎回申请激增
item.description: 贝莱德周五表示，在赎回请求激增后，已对旗下旗舰私募信贷基金设置了赎回限制，成为最新一家应对投资者对该资产类别谨慎情绪升温的公司。【原文：BlackRock said on Friday it has ​put limits on withdrawals from ‌a flagship private credit fund after a surge in redemption requests, making ​it the latest company responding ​to rising investor caution in ⁠the asset class.】

item.title: 美联储达利：就业市场脆弱，但风险具有双重性
item.description: 旧金山联储主席玛丽·戴利周五表示，美国就业报告表现弱于预期，这加剧了她对劳动力市场的担忧，但鉴于当前通胀率仍居高不下，加之伊朗冲突导致油价飙升，这种"双重"风险意味着美联储不应立即降息应对。【原文：San Francisco Federal Reserve President Mary Daly said Friday that ​a weaker-than-expected U.S. jobs report ‌underscores her concern about the labor market, but does not mean the ​Fed should immediately cut rates ​in response, given the "two-sided" risks posed ⁠by still-too-high inflation coupled with ​a runup in oil prices amid ​the Iran conflict.】

item.title: 据彭博社报道，蓝猫公司对已倒闭的英国房地产贷款机构存在3600万英镑的风险敞口。
item.description: 彭博社周五报道，蓝猫公司对总部位于伦敦的房地产贷款机构世纪资本合伙有限公司存在3600万英镑（4810万美元）的风险敞口，该公司上月已进入破产管理程序。【原文：Blue Owl ​has a ‌36 million ​pound ($48.10 ​million) exposure to ⁠Century ​Capital Partners ​Ltd, a London-based ​property ​lender that entered ‌administration ⁠last month, Bloomberg News ​reported ​on ⁠Friday.】

item.title: 美国2月非农就业数据令华尔街失望
item.description: 美国上月非农就业人数意外下滑，加剧了市场对经济健康状况的担忧，而此时正值美国与以色列卷入与伊朗的冲突之际。【原文：US nonfarm payrolls unexpectedly dropped last month, amplifying concerns about the health of the economy heading into the US-Israel conflict with Iran.】

item.title: 欧洲企业在美国最高法院裁决后应对关税混乱局面
item.description: 自美国最高法院推翻特朗普总统部分关键关税措施以来，欧洲企业正与美国客户展开磋商，就退税事宜寻求法律建议，并利用法律漏洞修改已进口货物的相关文件。【原文：Since the U.S. Supreme Court knocked down some of President Donald Trump's key ​tariffs, European firms have been talking with U.S. clients, seeking legal advice on refunds and using a loophole to amend documents for already imported goods.】

item.title: 外汇市场：美元因二月非农就业数据意外下滑而削减涨幅
item.description: 周五美元兑主要货币涨幅收窄，此前数据显示全球最大经济体上月新增就业岗位意外下滑，暗示美联储可能比预期更早降息。【原文：The ​dollar trimmed gains against major ‌currencies on Friday after data showed an unexpected decline in ​new jobs created in ​the world's largest economy last ⁠month, suggesting that the ​Federal Reserve could cut interest ​rates sooner than expected.】

item.title: 据CNBC报道，美国联合航空公司因伊朗冲突导致燃油成本飙升，业绩受到冲击。
item.description: 据CNBC周五报道，尽管出行需求依然强劲，但联合航空首席执行官斯科特·柯比预计，随着伊朗局势持续恶化导致燃油价格飙升，该公司第一季度业绩将遭受"重大"冲击。【原文：United Airlines CEO Scott Kirby expects a "meaningful" hit to the carrier's first-quarter ​results from surging fuel prices following ‌the deepening war in Iran, even as travel demand remains resilient, CNBC reported on Friday.】

item.title: 就业数据疲软后美联储降息预期升温
item.description: 交易员周五押注，在政府数据显示上月就业岗位减少后，美联储可能在6月再次下调短期借贷成本。【原文：The Federal Reserve may cut short-term ​borrowing costs again in ‌June after government data showed the economy shed ​jobs last month, ​traders bet on Friday.】

item.title: 美国2月非农就业人数减少；失业率升至4.4%
item.description: 美国经济在医护人员罢工和严冬天气的双重影响下出现就业岗位减少。【原文：The U.S. economy shed jobs amid a strike by healthcare workers and harsh winter weather.】

item.title: 保诚金融表示员工从签约机构移除了信息
item.description: 保诚金融周五表示，其外派至签约机构的员工擅自删除了这些机构的信息。【原文：Prudential Financial said on ​Friday its employees seconded ‌at contracted agencies removed information at those ​organizations without permission.】

item.title: 美联储沃勒：当前油价冲击对通胀影响不会持久 - 彭博电视
item.description: 美国联邦储备委员会理事克里斯托弗·沃勒周五表示，美国对伊朗发动空袭后油价上涨可能令消费者震惊，但全球油价的飙升不太可能导致持续通胀，也不构成改变货币政策的理由。【原文：Rising gas prices following the U.S. launch of airstrikes against Iran may be a shock to the consumer, but ​the global jump in oil is not likely to lead to persistent ‌inflation or warrant a change in monetary policy, U.S. Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller said on Friday.】

item.title: 西方联盟称杰富瑞拒绝根据宽限协议支付1.26亿美元
item.description: 西方联盟银行周五表示，已对杰富瑞金融集团提起诉讼。此前该金融集团通知该银行，将不会根据与第一品牌集团相关的宽限协议支付1.264亿美元到期款项。【原文：Western Alliance said on Friday it had sued Jefferies Financial ​after the financial conglomerate informed the ‌bank that it would not make $126.4 million in payments due under a forbearance agreement linked ​to the First Brands Group.】

item.title: 众议院委员会主席要求美联储主席鲍威尔尽快作证
item.description: 众议院金融服务委员会主席周五在接受彭博电视台采访时表示，他希望美联储主席向国会提交的半年度报告能尽快启动。【原文：The head of the House Financial ​Services Committee on Friday ‌told Bloomberg TV that he hoped that ​the first of ​the twice-yearly updates to Congress ⁠from the chair ​of the Federal Reserve ​will occur soon.】

item.title: 海湾主权财富基金本是为不时之需而设立。眼下或许正是用武之地。
item.description: 数十年来，海湾地区的主权财富基金持续积累并放大石油和天然气带来的财富，通过投资海外资产和国际市场，为未来不测之日储备了5万亿美元的资金池。【原文：For decades, the Gulf's sovereign wealth funds have preserved and amplified the riches from oil and gas, investing in overseas assets and international markets to create a $5 trillion pot for a rainy day.】

item.title: 威兹航空获准开通英国至美国包机航线
item.description: 廉价航空公司Wizz Air周五表示，其英国子公司已获得运营英国与美国间航班所需的许可，主要面向今夏世界杯期间前往观赛的欧洲足球队及球迷提供包机服务。【原文：Wizz Air's UK ​unit has ‌received necessary permits ​to operate ​flights between the ⁠United ​Kingdom and the ​United States, targeting charter services ​for ​European football teams ‌and ⁠supporters travelling to this summer's ​World ​Cup, ⁠the budget carrier ​said ​on ⁠Friday.】

item.title: 晨间竞标：东部战线风起云涌
item.description: 迈克·多兰和ROI团队本周末最期待阅读、观看和收听的内容。【原文：Everything Mike Dolan and the ROI team are excited to read, watch and listen to over the weekend.】

item.title: 受地缘政治担忧影响，美国股票基金遭遇八周来最大规模资金流出
item.description: 截至3月4日的七天内，美国股票基金遭遇八周来最严重的单周净赎回，投资者因担忧美以与伊朗冲突及其对通胀和利率前景的潜在影响而削减风险敞口。【原文：U.S. equity funds witnessed the sharpest weekly net sales in eight weeks in the seven days to ​March 4 as investors cut risk exposure amid concerns ‌over the U.S.-Israeli conflict with Iran and its potential impact on inflation and the interest-rate outlook.】

item.title: 伊朗冲突扩大，海运保险费率飙升
item.description: 随着海湾地区冲突扩大，海运战争险保费正急剧攀升——部分保费涨幅超过1000%——这使得通过这条关键海上运输通道输送能源的成本大幅增加。【原文：As the conflict in the Gulf widens, maritime insurance premiums for war coverage are surging -- in some cases by more than 1000% -- dramatically driving up the cost of moving energy ​through a critical maritime corridor.】

item.title: 美国航空公司不再对冲燃油成本。若伊朗冲突持续，这可能损害利润率。
item.description: 美国航空公司早已放弃对冲燃油成本的做法。随着美以联军对伊朗发动袭击后油价飙升，若冲突持续数月导致油价居高不下，航空公司的利润可能遭受重创。【原文：U.S. airlines abandoned the practice of hedging against fuel costs long ago. With oil prices ​surging following U.S.-Israel strikes on Iran, they could be looking at a big bite out of their bottom line in the event of a ‌lengthy conflict that keeps prices elevated for months.】

item.title: 白宫将敦促国防企业提高产量，因美国对伊朗的打击行动正消耗库存
item.description: 据消息人士透露，特朗普政府计划于周五在白宫会见美国最大国防承包商的高管，商讨加速武器生产事宜。此前五角大楼正努力补充因对伊朗实施打击及其他近期军事行动而消耗的物资储备。【原文：The Trump administration plans to meet executives from the ​biggest U.S. defense contractors at the White House on Friday to discuss accelerating weapons production, as ‌the Pentagon works to replenish supplies drawn down by U.S. strikes on Iranand other recent military operations, sources said.】

item.title: 中东战火肆虐一周，全球主要债券市场遭受重创
item.description: 全球最大债券市场本周收盘时正承受着重挫，因市场担忧中东战争将重燃通胀上行压力，迫使各国央行很快开始加息。【原文：The world's biggest bond markets were set to end the week nursing heavy losses as concerns that war in the Middle ​East will renew upward pressure on inflation and force central banks ‌to start hiking interest rates soon.】

item.title: 华尔街期货走低，中东冲突持续；就业数据成焦点
item.description: 美国股市期货周五走低，因中东地区持续的冲突可能推高能源成本从而加剧通胀，投资者同时等待关键就业报告的发布。【原文：U.S. stock index futures ​slipped on Friday as the conflict raging in the Middle East threatened to fuel inflation through ‌higher energy costs, and investors awaited a pivotal jobs report.】

item.title: 中国将深化深圳创业板改革，监管机构表示
item.description: 中国证券监管机构周五表示，深圳创业板（面向成长型企业的创业板）的改革已基本完成，北京正加大力度为本土科技领军企业输送更多融资。【原文：China's securities regulator said on Friday that reforms ​for ChiNext, Shenzhen's startup board for growth companies, were largely complete, as Beijing ‌steps up efforts to funnel more financing to homegrown tech champions.】

item.title: 《金融时报》报道称，美国企业被拒绝退还特朗普非法征收的关税
item.description: 《金融时报》周五援引知情人士报道称，美国政府拒绝退还最高法院裁定为非法的关税。【原文：The U.S. ​government has ‌declined to ​refund ​tariffs the Supreme ⁠Court ​has ruled ​illegal, the Financial Times ​reported ​on Friday citing ‌people ⁠familiar with the ​matter.】
